text.title: Two-Gate Threshold for Auto-Run
text.summary: An error tracker dispatches a coding agent only when BOTH the event-count gate AND the fixability-score gate clear; either alone produces unfixable noise or token waste.

section.title: Two independent gates
section.p: Sentry Seer ships with `min_events` (volume signal) and `min_fixability` (LLM-rated patchability) as separate dials. The volume gate filters one-offs; the fixability gate filters errors with no clean call-site (e.g., OOM, network reset). Either alone leaks: high volume + low fixability burns tokens on errors no agent can fix; high fixability + low volume opens PRs for irrelevant blips.

rule.statement: Configure auto-run with BOTH thresholds set: `min_events >= 10` AND `min_fixability >= 0.7`. Below either gate, the issue stays in tracker triage and is opened to an agent only via explicit `/autofix` slash command from a human. Disabling either threshold (`null`, `0`, `false`) MUST fail config validation.
rule.rationale: Sentry Seer's documented defaults; changelog and product docs describe this two-gate behaviour as the production-stable trigger that converted Autofix from preview to GA. Single-gate setups in third-party variants (Starsling) reverted to two gates after early-2026 token-cost incidents.

example.code: seer: autofix: auto_run_threshold: min_events: 10 min_fixability: 0.7 manual_trigger: slash_command: "/autofix" requires_human: true
example.note: Both gates set; humans can still force-trigger via slash command.

example.code: seer: autofix: auto_run_threshold: min_events: 1 # any event opens a PR # min_fixability omitted -> defaults to 0
example.note: Single-gate config; will open PRs for one-off network errors with no patch.

antipattern.description: "We will tune the threshold later — ship with `min_events: 1` for now."
antipattern.reason: The first cohort of unfixable PRs poisons trust in the tool; teams disable Autofix entirely instead of raising the gate. Set both gates from day one.

section.reference: Sentry Seer org-level config with both gates wired.
